data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimizes the size and distance of interactive elements to enhance usability.
data.technical_spec: Strategic UI element placement to minimize interaction effort.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies decision-making by reducing the number of choices available to the user.
data.technical_spec: Minimalist design and streamlined menu options.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Design matches user expectations to enhance familiarity and ease of use.
data.technical_spec: Consistent interface patterns similar to common apps.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Breaks information into chunks to enhance user retention and recall.
data.technical_spec: Divided content into bulleted points and sections.

data.title: Tesler’s Law
data.description: Limits complexity by only implementing necessary features.
data.technical_spec: Feature analysis to remove unnecessary elements.
